message:
test(engine): add mixed Int/Float arithmetic unit tests

- Add 11 unit tests for mixed Int/Float arithmetic operations:
  - Int + Float and Float + Int promotion to Float
  - Division returning Int for exact results, Float for fractional
  - Division by zero producing Infinity, 0/0 producing NaN
  - NaN propagation in arithmetic
  - Infinity * 0 producing NaN
  - Float modulo operation
  - Unary negation of Float
  - Classic IEEE 754 0.1 + 0.2 test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
